title: Partūr Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Partūr, with a Z-Score of +4.80. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Partūr has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. The temperature is exceptionally high, resulting in 15.8 GG of cooling degree days.
The relative humidity is at 35%, which can exacerbate the heat-related issues. The wind speed is moderate, at 9.0 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
The lack of heating degree days, at 0.0 GG, indicates that the focus is solely on cooling, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
agri_impact: Crops at risk of heat damage
